economic_notes: First Nation sold 4 housing units off-reserve subsequent to year-end for proceeds of $543,844. Gaming centre in Foxwarren, MB. Cattle ranch (Assiniboine Valley Cattle Ranch Inc.), general store, construction, and multiple other enterprises consolidated.
notes: Fiscal year 2021 (ended March 31, 2021). Nine subsidiaries fully consolidated including general store, housing authority, construction company, cattle ranch, and multiple other enterprises. Notes payable includes defaulted obligations to professional services firm and former business partner related to cattle/farm equipment. First Nation not in compliance with CMHC replacement reserve requirements (underfunded by $335,387). First Nation also non-compliant with First Nations Financial Transparency Act posting deadline. Due to ISC liability of $377,723 recorded. Deferred revenue increased significantly from $908K to $2.33M. Post year-end sale of 4 off-reserve housing units for $543,844. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($9,639,949) plus CMHC ($124,915). OSR includes sales, other revenue, First Peoples Development Inc., rental income, and net deferred revenue adjustment. expenses_salaries_total taken from cash flow statement (cash paid to employees). Annual debt service reflects long-term debt repayment only; notes payable repayment of $244,995 excluded.
warnings: High ISC dependency (92.14%) — operations heavily reliant on federal transfers
